paper_title: TSGaussian: Semantic and Depth-Guided Target-Specific Gaussian Splatting from Sparse Views
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (, PIL, arguments, colorsys, cv2, diff_gaussian_rasterization, errno, gaussian_renderer, groundingdino, huggingface_hub (+18 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: submodules/simple-knn/setup.py, submodules/diff-gaussian-rasterization/setup.py
